web_research.name: Web Research & Knowledge Synthesis
web_research.description: Boros retrieves external information from the web, evaluates source quality, synthesizes findings across multiple sources, and produces structured, actionable knowledge outputs.
web_research.final_state: An agent that reliably detects knowledge gaps, retrieves high-quality information from multiple sources, cross-validates claims, filters low-quality content, and returns structured summaries with source attribution.
anchors: Detects when external knowledge is needed before acting
Consults multiple sources rather than relying on one
Returns structured output with clear source attribution

rubric.level_1: Relies only on internal knowledge. Does not search even when information is clearly outdated or unknown.
rubric.level_2: Searches occasionally. Single-source reliance. Does not validate or cross-check.
rubric.level_3: Searches proactively. Uses multiple sources. Basic quality filtering. Returns organized summaries.
rubric.level_4: Systematic research: detects gaps, precise queries, multi-source cross-validation, bias detection, structured output with uncertainty markers and source links.

failure_modes: Using a single source without cross-checking
Poor query formulation yielding irrelevant results

fact_verification.name: Fact Verification & Source Validation
fact_verification.description: Boros verifies claims by checking them against multiple authoritative sources and clearly marks confidence levels.
fact_verification.final_state: An agent that challenges its own assumptions, verifies key claims through primary sources, identifies contradictions between sources, and returns confidence-annotated findings.
anchors: Questions its own assumptions before acting on them
Verifies claims through at least two independent sources
Marks uncertain or unverifiable claims clearly
Cites sources for all key factual claims

rubric.level_1: Accepts information at face value without verification.
rubric.level_2: Occasionally checks facts but not systematically.
rubric.level_3: Verifies important claims. Uses multiple sources for key facts.
rubric.level_4: Rigorous verification: challenges assumptions, dual-source minimum, contradiction detection, explicit confidence levels, full source citation.
